hero.heading: One app to replace them all

feature.heading: Delightfully simple and deceptively powerful task management
feature.subheading: 30 million+ people organize billions of tasks in Todoist for their work, education, and personal life.
feature.f1text: Use Todoist's apps, extensions and widgets on any device or platform.
feature.f2text: Customize your to-do list with filters, labels, priorities, and more.
feature.f3text: Personal productivity recommendations based on your unique traits and strengths.
feature.f4text: Hundreds of templates are available to get you started with whatever's on your plate.
feature.f5text: Link Todoist with your calendar, voice assistant, and 30+ other tools.

achievements.heading: A task manager you can trust for life
achievements.subheading: We've been building Todoist for 15 years and 169 days.
achievements.link: We're in it for the long haul.

footer.join: Join millions of people who organize work and life with Taskify.

cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience. By using Taskify, you agree to our

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: Welcome to Taskify. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy.
privacy.collect_text: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, and password when you create an account.
privacy.use_text: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to communicate with you.
privacy.cookies_text: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service. Cookies are files with a small amount of data stored on your device.
privacy.storage_text: Taskify uses browser local storage to save your preferences and session data. This data is stored locally on your device and is not transmitted to our servers.
privacy.security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.contact_text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: privacy@taskify.com
